steps.title: Group like terms
steps.content:
Combine $x$-terms with $x$-terms and $y$-terms with $y$-terms. The variables are different, so the $x$ terms and $y$ terms cannot be combined with each other.
$$10x+7x+4y+5y$$

steps.title: Add the coefficients
steps.content: Add the coefficients of each variable, then keep the same variable labels. $$(10+7)x+(4+5)y$$ $$17x+9y$$ The answer is D.
